overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in a long coat walking through a foggy, desolate moorland or mountain grassland at dusk. The atmosphere is heavy with blue-gray fog, limiting visibility, as the character carries a large case along a dirt path that transitions to grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail along cliff face

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a foggy dirt path carrying a large rectangular case, with a rocky cliff wall to the right

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation running parallel to the path on the right side
narrow dirt path winding through the foggy landscape
fog-shrouded mountain silhouettes barely visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a narrow dirt trail through heavy fog. A massive rocky cliff wall looms on the right side while the path stretches forward into the misty distance. The atmosphere is desolate and quiet, with low visibility due to the dense fog.

events.description: glowing blue-white particles become visible in the vegetation on the right side of the path
character begins a gradual left turn as the path curves through the grassland

agents.ego_description: character continues walking while gradually turning left, passing glowing vegetation on the right

entered.detail: bushes emitting soft blue-white glowing particles scattered on the right side of the path
low shrubs and tall grass lining the edges of the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character moves past the cliff wall, the landscape opens into a foggy grassland. Around the 28-second mark, vegetation on the right begins to emit a soft blue glow. The character follows a curving path, gradually turning left through the misty terrain as distant rock formations emerge from the fog.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to tall grassy moorland

agents.ego_description: character walking through tall grass in an open foggy landscape, heading toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: dense tall grass covering the ground, swaying slightly as the character moves through it
large rock formations visible through the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character moving through an open moorland where the path disappears into tall grass. The glowing vegetation is left behind as the landscape becomes more open, with only distant rock formations visible through the persistent fog. The character continues walking forward through the swaying grass toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy landscape that transitions from a claustrophobic cliffside trail into an expansive, glowing moorland. It begins by following a character along a narrow dirt path where a massive rocky cliff wall looms closely on the right under a heavy blanket of mist. As the character moves past the cliff, the terrain opens into a foggy grassland where the vegetation on the right begins to emit a soft blue glow. The scene then shifts as the character follows a curving path to the left, leaving the luminous plants behind while distant rock formations emerge from the haze. Finally, the path disappears entirely as the camera tracks the character walking through tall, swaying grass toward a distant, fog-shrouded horizon.
